channel.title: tools - Category - Neo's Blog
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

item.title: A leetcode languages switch Chrome extension
item.author: neotan.github.io
item.description: Switching between English and Chinese site and logging down question URLs easily. https://github.com/neotan/leetcode-languages-switch-chrome-extension Installation Download this repo by clicking uper-right Download ZIP under the Clone dropdown menu Extract the .zip file as a folder e.g. leetcode-languages-switch-chrome-extension-master Open your Chrome > type chrome://extensions/ in the address bar Turn on Developer mode at the upper right Click Load unpacked, and point to above unzipped folder A new plugin will be installed, shows an computer icon with a green tick UsageOpen leetcode.

item.title: Atlantic (Canada) Immigration Pilot Program (AIPP)- Designated Employers (incl. NS, NB, NL, PEI)
item.author: neotan.github.io

item.title: Canada Universities Ranking
item.author: neotan.github.io
item.description: input[type="search"]::-webkit-search-cancel-button { -webkit-appearance: searchfield-cancel-button; } mark { padding: 0; } import {getAllData, flat, emptyRender, urlRender} from '../../js/helpers.mjs' var urls = [ "./canada-universities.json" ] $(document).ready(function() { getAllData(urls).then((data)={ $('#ca-universities-table').DataTable({ data: flat(data, 'data', 'University'), mark: true, responsive: true, stateSave: true, columns: [ { data: 'Ranking', title:'Ranking' }, { data: 'WorldRank', title:'WorldRank' }, { data: 'University', title:'University', render: urlRender('University') }, { data: 'Detalles', title:'Detalles', render: urlRender('Detalles') }, { data: 'PresenceRank', title:'PresenceRank' }] }) }) }) Datatables APIs Bootstrap APIs

item.title: Greasemoney script for 百度云盘(web)文件批量重命名
item.author: neotan.github.io
item.description: Renaming tool for Baidu Netdisk (web-based) script 百度网盘的重命名小工具DescriptionA GreaseMonkey script renaming files on web-based version of baidu netdisk Usage Install Tampermonkey Install this script Open pan.baidu.com/disk A renaming tool will show on the top of file list Input what you want to search and replace Click Rename button Screen shots

item.title: Greasemoney script for cost of living data of numbeo.com comparison
item.author: neotan.github.io
item.description: Cost of living data comparison scriptDescriptionA GreaseMonkey script for visualizing multiple cities' data from www.numbeo.com/cost-of-living/ Usage Install Tampermonkey Install this script Open www.numbeo.com or its sub routes Will see Charts and Table be attached on the page Change the city names(split them with comma) in Cities field Press Enter key or click the Submit button ChartTable

item.title: Import/export Chrome Developer Tools' Snippets
item.author: neotan.github.io
item.description: Chrome offered a excellent feature: Snippets Chrome DevTools Snippets People made lots for userful snippets: DevTools Snippets by Brian Grinstead But Chrome doesn’t provide a sync/export/import function to backup and sync those snippets, fortunately, people hacked it up: devtools-snippets/import-export/chrome at master · bgrins/devtools-snippets Export/Import chrome devtools snippets I prefer the 2nd option as it’s simple and less error-prone, let me show you how to play with it.
